visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a white top stands in a modern living room/kitchen setting. She holds a large blue Kirkland Signature bag of frozen shrimp, smiling broadly and gesturing toward it. The background is brightly lit with warm indoor lights. (2) The scene shifts to a close-up of a glass bowl containing raw, peeled shrimp. A hand pours white rum from a Bacardi bottle over the shrimp. The counter is white and clean. (3) The camera focuses on a tall, stainless steel electric pepper grinder as it grinds black peppercorns directly onto the shrimp in the bowl. (4) An overhead shot shows olive oil being poured from a white dispenser into a grey stone-textured frying pan on a gas stove. (5) Minced garlic is added to the heated oil in the pan, and the pan is tilted to distribute the garlic. (6) The shrimp are placed individually into the hot pan using silver metal tongs. Sizzling oil is visible around the garlic and shrimp. (7) A square pat of yellow butter is added to the center of the pan on top of the cooking shrimp. (8) As the shrimp turn pink and opaque, the electric grinder is used again to season them with more pepper. (9) A hand sprinkles white salt over the pan. (10) The cook tosses the pan, showing the shrimp coated in a glossy garlic-butter sauce, nearly finished.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 簡單做料理. [Subtitle]: 科克蘭冷凍帶尾超大養殖生蝦仁. (2) [Subtitle]: 那這一袋有908克. (3) [Subtitle]: 大概是兩磅. (4) [Subtitle]: 總共有42隻到50隻. (5) [Variety]: 559元. [Subtitle]: 價格是559元. (6) [Subtitle]: 所以一隻最低可以來到11塊. (7) [Slogan]: 讓妹妹來簡單的教大家做料理吧. (8) [Subtitle]: 妹妹會先加入隨意的萊姆酒. (9) [Subtitle]: 高濃度的白酒都可以. (10) [Subtitle]: 加胡椒鹽. (11) [Subtitle]: 先加一點橄欖油. (12) [Subtitle]: 倒入蒜. (13) [Subtitle]: 讓油去爆香他. (14) [Subtitle]: 嗶嗶啵啵代表他的蒜已經爆香了. (15) [Subtitle]: 就可以放入蝦蝦. (16) [Subtitle]: 下面稍微的變色. (17) [Subtitle]: 就可以先加入奶油. (18) [Subtitle]: 接下來讓時間帶給他美味. (19) [Subtitle]: 快熟的時候我會調味加一些胡椒. (20) [Subtitle]: 然後再加一些鹽巴. (21) [Subtitle]: 稍微收一下. (22) [Subtitle]: 覺得差不多就好了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting and cooking.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair wearing a black beret, a white long-sleeved turtleneck top, and light-colored pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scene features a cozy living room with a brown leather sofa and warm lighting. The cooking scenes take place in a modern kitchen with white countertops, a grey stone-textured pan, and various kitchen seasonings and bottles visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy electronic BGM begins. A female narrator speaks with a high pitch and enthusiastic tone, introducing the Costco shrimp product. Her speech is clear and rapid. (2) A clear sound of liquid splashing into a bowl occurs as rum is added. The BGM maintains its steady, upbeat rhythm. (3) A sequence of mechanical clicking sounds from an electric pepper grinder is heard over the narration. (4) A soft pouring sound of oil, followed by the sudden onset of a high-frequency sizzling sound as garlic hits a hot pan. The narrator's voice remains energetic. (5) Periodic metallic clinking from tongs is interspersed with continuous sizzling. (6) A sharp 'ding' or pop SFX is used to emphasize the addition of butter. (7) Continuous sizzling dominates the mid-high frequencies as the shrimp cook, accompanied by another round of electric grinder clicks. (8) The narrator concludes with a satisfied, slightly falling intonation as the cooking process wraps up, with the BGM fading out quickly at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Intro/Hook -> Preparation -> Cooking Process -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote Kirkland Signature frozen shrimp from Costco by demonstrating a quick and easy 'Garlic Butter Shrimp' recipe. It uses an enthusiastic presentation style and fast-paced editing to show the value and convenience of the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video starts with a large Costco logo, prominently features Kirkland Signature packaging, and provides specific pricing and value propositions for the product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines social media aesthetics with a direct product review. The use of high-energy narration and on-screen text overlays makes it highly engaging for a mobile-first audience.
